faq.question: Can I automate this process?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Upload this file to a cloud drive (like Google Drive) and n8n can ingest the data on a schedule or via webhook.

faq.question: Does this CSV template work with n8n?
faq.answer: Yes, it is fully compatible with n8n's Read Binary File and valid JSON parsing nodes.

faq.question: Can I automate this process?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Upload this file to a cloud drive (like Google Drive) and n8n can ingest the data on a schedule or via webhook.

faq.question: What are the required fields?
faq.answer: The template includes all required fields pre-mapped out of the box to prevent validation errors.
